name: Justin Barasky
subject: Did you donate $26 to Sherrod?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | We need your help. We're only **48** hours away from our February deadline, and we're behind on our goal. Sherrod sent you a message and I want to make sure it doesn't get lost in your inbox because it's important. I pasted it below in case you missed it. **We won in 2012 on the strength of our grassroots team.** If we are going to emerge from this election with another victory we can't deviate from that formula. We need to bring the same grassroots energy -- if not more -- in 2018. There's not much time left. [_**Match our average online contribution of $26 or donate whatever you can right now.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008136/1456758696/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?refcode=sbe180226pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thank you, Justin _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: Peter, can you give our average gift of $26?_ My opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, has bragged to the Ohio GOP that he's going defeat me. I think Congressman Renacci has severely underestimated us. He is obviously counting on special interest groups to lift him to victory. **He 's counting on the support of the Koch brothers and their millionaire and billionaire friends.** And don't get me wrong. Congressman Renacci will get their support. But we have something better: _a passionate grassroots team._ In 2012, I faced more than $40 million in spending against me. My opponent and his backers thought they had spent their way to a victory. [**_Needless to say, our grassroots team was stronger. It was a shield against special interest money. We need to bring that same intensity right now. We can 't miss a single goal. Help us reach our goal by matching our average online contribution of $26._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008136/1456758696/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?refcode=sbe180226pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008135/1456758696/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180226pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008135/1456758696/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180226pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008135/1456758696/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180226pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008136/1456758696/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?refcode=sbe180226pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** The special interest playbook hasn't changed. Ever since _Citizens United_ allowed outside groups to spend unlimited sums of money in our elections -- they've written one seven-figure check after another. But we're sticking to what really works: building a big grassroots team of everyday Americans who make small-dollar donations. We're working our way toward victory one $26 contribution at a time. [**_One $26 contribution at a time_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008136/1456758696/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?refcode=sbe180226pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183"), we build a ground game of volunteers who will go door to door. [**_One $26 contribution at a time_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008136/1456758696/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?refcode=sbe180226pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183"), we fund budgets for field offices, equipment, phone banks, and signs. [**_One $26 contribution at a time_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4ed/4462dc26/48280b96/20008136/1456758696/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180226pm?refcode=sbe180226pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183"), we can win a huge victory in 2018. Thank you for standing with me. With gratitude, Sherrod
---

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Secure victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

[](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-feb28-deadline?amount=27&recurring=true&refcode2=landscape&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1")While President Trump's administration is dominating the national headlines, the fight for the Senate majority is being waged on the ground, in key states like New Mexico. Here's the latest:

* We now have TWO right-wing opponents in our race. That means attacks will be coming from all angles as we head into November.
* The Koch brothers have vowed to spend **$400 MILLION** in the 2018 midterms to defeat Democrats, and they already have boots on the ground here in New Mexico.
* **Now we are facing our first fundraising deadline since this news broke, and we are coming up short. This is an urgent deadline that we cannot miss.**

If we do not secure victory in New Mexico, Democrats could fall short of taking back the Senate majority. That is why we cannot miss a single fundraising deadline between now and Election Day.

[_**Here 's what we need to do: close our $25,000 fundraising gap before the end-of-month deadline on February 28. Will you chip in $27 or more and help us stay on track for victory?**_](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-feb28-deadline?amount=27&recurring=true&refcode2=landscape&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Herersquos+what+we+need+to+do+close+our+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1")

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-feb28-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1")** **[Donate $27 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-feb28-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-feb28-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-feb28-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1")** Election Day will be here before we know it, and we do not have a second to lose. My campaign must have a strong foothold to weather the attacks that will come from the Kochs and my opponents, and that means having the resources to fight for a stronger and forward-moving New Mexico.

Your donation before the end-of-month deadline will give us the resources to win. We cannot do it without you.

[_**Pitch in today and help secure New Mexico for victory and take back the Senate in November.**_](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-feb28-deadline?amount=27&recurring=true&refcode2=landscape&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Pitch+in+today+and+help+secure+New+Mexic&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180226_1_1")

Thanks for standing with me,
Martin

name: Team Corey
subject: RSVP Today: Shoot and Greet with Corey Stewart in Alexandria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc
body:
This Monday, March 5th at 6:30 PM, Corey Stewart will be hosting a Shoot and Greet in Alexandria at SpecDive Tactical as part of his Shoot and Greet Tour of the Commonwealth. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605349:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)
---
Peter,

_**There is no Senator who will fight harder to protect & further your Second Amendment rights than Corey Stewart.**_

That is why the Stewart for Senate campaign will be holding a series of events across the Commonwealth in support of the Second Amendment. This Monday, March 5th at 6:30 PM, Corey Stewart will be **[hosting a Shoot& Greet in Alexandria at SpecDive Tactical](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605349:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)** as part of his Shoot & Greet Tour of the Commonwealth.

We must defeat anti-gun Senator Tim Kaine. As Mayor of Richmond, he spent thousands of taxpayer dollars to send activists to D.C. to participate in an anti-Second Amendment rally. As Senator, he's been behind every scheme by the left to restrict your God-given Constitutional rights.

**[Join us for a Shoot& Greet on Monday, March 5th, at 6:30 PM at SpecDive Tactical in Alexandria.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605349:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)** _**SpecDive has an electronic range set up for guests to shoot on!**_

As Chairman of Prince William County, Corey eliminated the fee to obtain a concealed carry permit, believing that no law-abiding citizen should ever have to pay the government to practice their constitutional rights.

Tell Tim Kaine your rights shall not be infringed and join us this upcoming Monday, March 5th, at SpecDive Tactical, 5710 General Washington Dr E in Alexandria, at 6:30 PM.

**[Alexandria](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605349:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)**
Meet & Greet at SpecDive Tactical
5710 General Washington Dr E
Alexandria, VA 22312
March 5, 2018 at 6:30pm - 9pm
**[RSVP Website](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605349:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)** - **[RSVP Facebook](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605350:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)**

Feel free to bring your friends and family and come see why Corey is the candidate we need to send to DC to fight for us.

RSVP to attend Monday [here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605349:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r).

Best,

Team Corey

P.S. if you cannot attend, but would still like to support Corey and help defeat Tim Kaine, **[would you consider a campaign contribution of $10 or more today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605351:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)**

| [** RSVP Today >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/46605349:sJlLQ1VPN:m:1:1997407466:C7DF72482FE833A760C05E6541F0F5BA:r)

name: The White House
subject: ‘Turn our grief into action’
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74a8b0cc9cc357f2205ef8877426a0665772159613168b299b763d39d484ade5549399ce43e963f15c99dc4a9097b96cc678f15aff36d447

‘Turn our grief into action’

President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence addressed nearly 80 percent of the Nation’s governors yesterday at a bipartisan business session at the White House. Although the President highlighted many successes from the past year—including tax reform and early signs that tough sanctions against North Korea are working—he told attendees that one issue should be at the top of everyone’s mind.

“Most importantly, we want to discuss the public safety in schools and public safety, generally. But school safety. We can’t have this go on,” the President said.

“But we will turn our grief into action,” President Trump continued. “We have to take steps to harden our schools so that they are less vulnerable to attack.” The President specifically mentioned better regulating of bump stocks, addressing mental health concerns, and improving early warning response systems to help diminish the risk of violence.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74a8b0cc9cc357f288d2e112526e081489d09974c889d91cd5e97c5088a0ee6b1b39f4aa6cc9fd753eb5f052a5ff4d129d3ea1cabcc0e6d0
Watch a short recap of President Trump’s meeting with America’s governors.

Fixing NAFTA

This afternoon, President Trump will sit down with Republican lawmakers from the House Ways and Means Committee to share how his Administration wants to improve the North American Free Trade Agreement for all Americans.

Here is a preview of what the President plans to say:

- To build on the incredible success of tax reform, our Nation’s leaders must make sure that America’s trade deals aren’t shipping jobs overseas.
-
On the campaign trail, President Trump promised voters he would get tough with bilateral trade agreements, fix the trade deficit, and modernize NAFTA. “That is exactly what the American people voted for.”
- Smart trade means reciprocal trade, and that starts with tariffs. U.S. tariffs should match those of our trading partners, which will put pressure on other countries to embrace freer trade.

Learn more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74a8b0cc9cc357f2781e8f9a6bb26b0891d059004b4c80f6e0571c456b4a249b401f4d61061db564cfb6a4da4ca44c73c80ce4a32d014528
America has finally turned the page on decades of unfair trade deals.

‘And that’s a wrap!’

About three weeks ago, Vice President Pence traveled to South Korea with Second Lady Karen Pence to lead the American Olympic delegation into the Pyeongchang Opening Ceremony. This past weekend, Ivanka Trump represented U.S. leaders at the Closing Ceremony.

“And that’s a wrap!” Trump tweeted. “I return to the US after an incredible few days at the #WinterOlympics deeply proud of our #TeamUSA athletes and excited to have witnessed American dreams become new records and historic achievements at #PyeongChang2018.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74a8b0cc9cc357f28dd40d33d9d290f03970e79662ee337a92178eb1e1929ca9e5d534c84a969fb898bc7f3ba2ae291881318ed26129adc1
Watch a 1-minute montage of Ivanka Trump’s trip to the Pyeongchang Games.

Bonus read:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74a8b0cc9cc357f2e75e931f480cec639c79764d0d841cc0ef30deeadcebacbd51426e9f16abd0f4d260e36c6c66c0a8374854099f118e08
The Olympics prove America is stronger when kids from all backgrounds play sports.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump at the 2018 White House Business Session with state governors | February 26, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will meet with Republican members of the Senate about renewable fuel standards. The President will then receive the Boy Scouts of America Report to the Nation.

This afternoon, the President will meet with Republican members of the House of Representatives about trade. Later, the President will make an announcement regarding additional leadership in the White House Initiative on Historically Black Colleges and Universities.

Today, Vice President Pence will deliver remarks to the Susan B. Anthony List & Life Institute Luncheon. Later, the Vice President will delivers remarks to the National Religious Broadcasters’ 75th Annual Convention before participating in a Republican Governors Association event with Governor Bill Haslam of Tennessee.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74a8b0cc9cc357f2bccb0bb4c696b34b4038a34a85ed25489317479982a078f304975870c5e257a23731082c4f7a200d5e61bd9323dd0262
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=74a8b0cc9cc357f2def756226bc6a9690c451f0bd1f3d9d39aaae021b87adee96bba90af7e758e0e257f2bbe6bd83a567e8f8237fc529d68
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48ff4ef2257574bc7671a171bded6e68b5e5d414c1f76054a91d9024785601d6be4c319013b507590c529963565e35b088df372aa2469c737
Unsubscribe

name: Susan B. Anthony List
subject: Let him know: "I've got your back!"
body:
I want to show him the list of supporters
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDU4LTA3YTdkOWFiNmIzZDRkYWJiZjEyZDNiODUzZTZjOTdj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2JhbGlzdGFjdGlvbi5jb20vc3RhbmQtd2l0aC1wZW5jZS0wMjIyMThlay8&K=G1OsRh3wk8udOJuAp7yOoA)
---
Loyal Supporter, Exciting news! Vice President Mike Pence will speak at an event we are hosting today in Nashville, Tennessee! I want to surprise the Vice President with a list of supporters to encourage him to keep fighting for LIFE! I'm asking pro-life Americans like you to add your name to tell Vice President Pence: We've got your back! **[Add your name to show V.P. Pence you have his back.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDU4LTA3YTdkOWFiNmIzZDRkYWJiZjEyZDNiODUzZTZjOTdj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2JhbGlzdGFjdGlvbi5jb20vc3RhbmQtd2l0aC1wZW5jZS0wMjIyMThlay8&K=8l7tWCRwrctwWp_zLknxdA) **[ADD MY NAME](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDU4LTA3YTdkOWFiNmIzZDRkYWJiZjEyZDNiODUzZTZjOTdj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2JhbGlzdGFjdGlvbi5jb20vc3RhbmQtd2l0aC1wZW5jZS0wMjIyMThlay8&K=gUf5jnD9csWlc1E6Rj-J0g)** Earlier this month the mainstream media mocked our Vice President's faith, accusing him of having mental illness. And you've no doubt seen the nasty attacks on Vice President Pence for his strong leadership to defund Planned Parenthood, America's largest abortion business. I know our Vice President is going to be so encouraged when I show him the list with your name on it! **[ADD MY NAME](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDU4LTA3YTdkOWFiNmIzZDRkYWJiZjEyZDNiODUzZTZjOTdj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2JhbGlzdGFjdGlvbi5jb20vc3RhbmQtd2l0aC1wZW5jZS0wMjIyMThlay8&K=IxsZP-skgojwMCQsoBqEAA)** **So please add your name to the list of supporters now so I can show Vice President Pence you have his back!** For _LIFE_ , Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony List P.S. Please forward my email to your friends and family and urge them to sign so I can show Vice President Pence a huge list of pro-life Americans. I want to surprise the Vice President with a list of supporters to encourage him to keep fighting for LIFE! I'm asking pro-life Americans like you to add your name to tell Vice President Pence: We've got your back! Earlier this month the mainstream media mocked our Vice President's faith, accusing him of having mental illness. And you've no doubt seen the nasty attacks on Vice President Pence for his strong leadership to defund Planned Parenthood, America's largest abortion business. I know our Vice President is going to be so encouraged when I show him the list with your name on it! name: Tim Kaine
subject: Need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek -

**No campaign comes without some tough news:** Conservative PACs are already pouring money into Virginia to defeat me.
* The Tea Party Majority Fund has officially started a phone campaign against me.
* The Committee to Defend the President is investing in this race.

I'm no stranger to this - in 2012, far-right groups spent $28,000,000 trying to defeat me. _There is no doubt in my mind they will throw everything they can at me again this time._

But I am so fortunate to have amazing supporters (that's you!) that fuel my campaign with small-dollar, grassroots donations. So I'm coming to you to help me raise $30,000 as we close out this month and keep ourselves on pace for the entire quarter: [Will you chip in a small amount to help my campaign fight back when these attacks inevitably come?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hoc9HuAQCzz8gXZU6FxDQcI26vuj%2FsTi) [Chip in $5 to my campaign today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=KcCsLg%2FhA31MRom%2BgAGzZcI26vuj%2FsTi)

[Chip in $25 to my campaign today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jYbgdeD0vJvUtFHTR8yWXsI26vuj%2FsTi)

Our team is a coalition of many, many real people who share real values, and together we can advocate for those values in Virginia, and across the nation, to send a big message to the far-right groups investing in this race that dark money and attack ads won't win.

So what do you say, team? We know we can stand tall against these attacks if we stay on track for our February goal and finish the quarter strong. clean_body: Derek - No campaign comes without some tough news: Conservative PACs are already pouring money into Virginia to defeat me. The Tea Party Majority Fund has officially started a phone campaign against me. The Committee to Defend the President is investing in this race. I'm no stranger to this - in 2012, far-right groups spent $28,000,000 trying to defeat me. There is no doubt in my mind they will throw everything they can at me again this time. But I am so fortunate to have amazing supporters (that's you!) that fuel my campaign with small-dollar, grassroots donations. So I'm coming to you to help me raise $30,000 as we close out this month and keep ourselves on pace for the entire quarter: When it comes to news like this, I always tell my staff the same thing: It 's not about the money, it's about the many. Our team is a coalition of many, many real people who share real values, and together we can advocate for those values in Virginia, and across the nation, to send a big message to the far-right groups investing in this race that dark money and attack ads won't win. So what do you say, team? We know we can stand tall against these attacks if we stay on track for our February goal and finish the quarter strong. name: Becca Sharp, Democrats.org
subject: You can join us at the IWillVote Gala, Derek
body:
You could win a chance to attend our 2018 IWillVote Gala -- enter today.
---
I'm Becca Sharp, Operations Director at the DNC, and today I have some exciting news to share with you.

On Wednesday, March 7th, the DNC is hosting our 2018 IWillVote Gala in Washington, D.C. with special guests Elizabeth Warren, Kirsten Gillibrand, Cory Booker, and Doug Jones. Here's the best part: If you contribute before tomorrow's fundraising deadline, you'll be automatically entered for a chance to join us -- plus you may even get to meet Doug Jones and take a picture with him!

**Chip in $3 before midnight tomorrow to be automatically entered to win a trip to Washington, D.C. for you and a friend to attend the IWillVote Gala.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e577539/3643278161/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iwillvote-gala-donate?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774c6/3643278161/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iwillvote-gala-donate?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774c7/3643278161/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iwillvote-gala-donate?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774c4/3643278161/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iwillvote-gala-donate?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774c5/3643278161/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iwillvote-gala-donate?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774c2/3643278161/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iwillvote-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb")
** We'll take care of your hotel, book your travel, and reserve your seats at the gala -- so all you have to worry about is who you'll bring as your guest. 2018 is a crucial year for Democrats, and you'll get to hear directly from our senators and party leaders about how we can win.

This will be a memorable event that you won't want to miss -- so enter now for your chance to attend.

**[Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow and be automatically entered to come to Washington, D.C. and attend our IWillVote Gala.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774c3/3643278161/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iwillvote-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Donate++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+max&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb")**

Can't wait to hear from you,

Becca

Becca Sharp
Director of Operations
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774c1/3643278161/VEsFBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774ce/3643278161/VEsFAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220a9/4067b0a/56b0e1ae6/7e5774cf/3643278161/VEsFAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180227_bs_bb&source=em_20180227_bs_bb&refcode=em_20180227_bs_bb"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

| | Fellow Republican -

Your past support helped stop Hillary Clinton’s coronation by delivering a massive 19-point victory for President Donald Trump and our very own Vice President Mike Pence. And it helped elect Governor Eric Holcomb in an historic 106-day campaign while also re-electing our pro-taxpayer supermajorities in the Indiana House and Senate.

As a result, Indiana continues to grow good-paying jobs and the Trump Tax Cut (the first major national tax reform since Reagan) is starting to show up in paychecks across the state.
**But outraged Democrats want to reverse course!**
**With just eight months until Election Day, we are back in the trenches in all 92 counties rebuilding our regional Victory Centers, and recharging the voter networks that make the difference in photo finish wins – and we need you with us! **

It’s not exactly a secret that the national Democrats think of us as “deplorables” from flyover country and are desperate to keep one of their own -- Democrat Joe Donnelly -- in their back pocket.

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: What will it take?
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501133282%2501100308%2b-%2b02-27-2018%2beNewsletter%250114253QQQ8420806QQQ3850937QQQ7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501133282%2501100308%2b-%2b02-27-2018%2beNewsletter%250114253QQQ8420806QQQ3850937QQQ7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **February 27, 2018** |
---|---|---|---
| | | This month we saw another senseless act of gun violence take the lives of our nation's children. We must do everything in our power to stop this horror. How many more shootings will it take before Congress stops talking and takes action? This issue shouldn't be political--it should be about doing everything we can to prevent the loss of another child, another parent. It should be about saving another town like Parkland from the grief of a mass shooting and relieving cities like Baltimore from the daily toll of gun violence. Inaction is complicity--it's as simple as that. That's what I'm telling my colleagues, and I hope you'll tell your friends, family, and neighbors the same. With over 90 percent of Americans saying they want action, the GOP leadership's refusal to consider measures that are proven to save lives is gross negligence. The list of common sense measures is clear: close the gun show loophole and implement universal background checks; plug the gaps in the current reporting systems for instant background checks; improve our mental health system and our ability to prevent individuals who pose a risk to themselves and others from obtaining firearms; ban semi-automatic assault weapons like the AR-15; limit the number of rounds in magazines; implement a licensing system modeled after the Maryland law; outlaw bump stocks; and eliminate the law that shields the gun industry from lawsuits for wrongdoing. All of these measures are consistent with the Second Amendment, and we must not rest until we address gun violence in a meaningful way. Chris Van Hollen
---
### Preventing Russian Interference in Future Elections
We now have indisputable proof from Robert Mueller's indictments of 13 Russian individuals and 3 entities that the Kremlin worked to undermine our most recent elections. This comes on the heels of public statements by the Director of National Intelligence, the Director of the CIA, and the Secretary of State that they expect Russia will interfere again in the upcoming 2018 elections. We need to take action immediately to defend our democracy, and I have introduced bipartisan legislation with Senator Marco Rubio (R-Fla.) to do just that. The DETER Act would discourage interference in our elections from Russia or any other country by imposing automatic, severe economic sanctions on any country caught doing so. Every American, regardless of political party, should support this effort to protect the integrity of our elections.
### Honoring Frederick Douglass
On February 14th, we held a ceremony in the U.S. Capitol to celebrate the 200th anniversary of the birth of Frederick Douglass. Maryland is proud to share in the history of this great American, who was born on the Eastern Shore. At the event, members of the Frederick Douglass Bicentennial Commission were also sworn in. I was honored to work with Congresswoman Eleanor Holmes Norton to introduce and pass legislation to establish this Commission, and I'm proud to serve as a member of the Commission. I was also pleased to join the Mayor of Baltimore on Saturday to honor Douglass, who worked at the docks in Baltimore before escaping slavery and eventually becoming one of the world's greatest abolitionist leaders and a staunch advocate for women's suffrage. His actions helped build a more perfect union, but we have a long journey still ahead. The lessons Frederick Douglass taught us are as valuable in lighting the way forward as they are in illuminating the past.
### Protecting Dreamers
Earlier this month, a majority of Senators voted for a bipartisan compromise that would have finally ensured that our Dreamers have security in the country they call home. It was by no means perfect, and I was particularly disappointed that it did not include protections for individuals with Temporary Protected Status who are living in our country legally and parents of Dreamers who are facing the same fears of having their families torn apart. But it would have provided a path toward citizenship for the over 1.6 million Dreamers who came here as children and have grown up pledging allegiance to the American flag. In the face of President Trump's despicable flip-flop, we did not have enough Republican votes to garner the 60 votes necessary to move forward. The President asked Congress to negotiate a solution--we did. He asked for full funding for border security to build parts of a wall that he had previously promised that Mexico would pay for--the bill did. Trump was again exposed for saying one thing and doing another, but the way forward is unclear. The overwhelming majority of the country supports the Dreamers, and when the March 5th deadline arrives, more Republicans may be willing to support a reasonable compromise.
### Spending Time on the Eastern Shore
Senator Cardin and I recently joined the Greater Salisbury Committee and local residents for a Community Conversation at Salisbury University. We had the opportunity to speak with over 300 residents and students about a wide range of issues, including ways we can bolster small businesses, expand access to broadband, support our local farmers, and protect the Chesapeake Bay. I also had the opportunity to participate in the groundbreaking of Salisbury's new Riverwalk Amphitheater, which will host the National Folk Festival in September, and visit Hoopers Island Oyster Company in Cambridge. From the Eastern Shore to Western Maryland, from the Baltimore region to the Washington suburbs, and all points in between, Maryland is truly "America in Miniature." I always welcome the opportunity to meet with and listen to the concerns of people across our state, and I'm committed to bringing your thoughts, ideas, and concerns back to the U.S. Senate.
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=14253QQQ8420806QQQ3850937QQQ7517223)

name: Jeanie Forrester

body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf34/73a2bc12/3eaf813d/1fccb2e1/1223242559/VEsH/ "http://wolfforpa.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__js&source=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__js") Hello --

As one of Governor Wolf's strongest supporters, I wanted you to know that we launched our first TV ad of the election.

**[Watch the video of Governor Wolf's first TV ad now -- then chip in to help us keep it on the air.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf34/73a2bc12/3eaf813d/1fccb2e0/1223242559/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Tom-Wolf-Ad?utm_campaign=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Wolf&refcode=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__JS?noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Watch+the+video+of+Governor+Wolfs+first+")**
[](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf34/73a2bc12/3eaf813d/1fccb2e7/1223242559/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Tom-Wolf-Ad?utm_campaign=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Wolf&refcode=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__JS?noskip=true&utm_content=3")
This new video explains why Tom's a different kind of leader -- the kind Pennsylvania needs now.

As a businessman, Tom shared nearly 30 percent of his company's profits with employees. After taking the oath of office, he banned members of his administration from accepting gifts from lobbyists. He not only donates his salary to charity -- he refuses a state pension. And Tom still lives in the same house and drives his Jeep to work.

Every day Tom's working to change Harrisburg for all of us -- and he needs our help to keep fighting.

**Chip in now to help us reach voters all across Pennsylvania with Tom's first TV ad of the election:**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Tom-Wolf-Ad](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf34/73a2bc12/3eaf813d/1fccb2e6/1223242559/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Tom-Wolf-Ad?utm_campaign=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Wolf&refcode=em18_180223_NewAd_fnd_gq_ful__JS?noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonateTomWolfAd")**

Thanks for your support,

Jeff Sheridan
Campaign Manager
Tom Wolf for Governor

name: Steve Schultz
subject: Re: "work a little harder"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I remember the campaign Debbie talked about in her message yesterday. We'd been married for about a year then. Debbie went out every day, rain or shine, to knock on doors. I got so worried by how much weight she was losing from all the walking, I sent her out the door with a milkshake every morning on top of breakfast. Debbie's never lost that work ethic. When South Florida families are at risk, Debbie fights to protect us. It makes her a great Congresswoman. It also makes her a target. It's why she's up against five opponents and attacks from all sides. **We have to work just as hard as she does.[_This month, that means raising $20,000 by the deadline on the 28th. If you can, chip in $5, $10, or even more to show Debbie you've got her covered._](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f90/622b7b5b/198f85d3/307bb1f3/2724349312/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180227?refcode=dwse180227_m&recurring=true&amount=5")** Thank you. Steve Schultz
---

name: LegitAction Team
subject: Rising above Trump’s Twitter feed
disclaimer_text: paid for by LegitAction, Inc
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Legit supporters know that getting angry about every ugly Trump tweet
is a waste of time. We’d rather stay focused on our mission and make a
real, permanent impact on our democracy in 2018.

And we already have. The sham Trump-Pence election commission is dead.
Thomas Brunell’s nowhere in sight. But equally grave threats to
legitimacy are ahead, and we have to be ready.

Legit supporters across the country are stepping up to help us reach
our grassroots goal for February, because they know what LegitAction
is capable of when we’re funded full-strength.

All we need to make sure we’re funded full-strength for March is
another $3,915 by the deadline tomorrow. Are you in?

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5607?t=1002&akid=656%2E356062%2E7Zg77J ]Contribute $3 now to
help reach our February financial goal by tomorrow’s deadline. We’re
still $3,915 away.

We can’t keep up this incredible string of victories without your
continued support. We’re relying on you to head full-strength into
March.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

LegitAction Team

name: Leah Vukmir

body:
The senate continues to be the best example of Washington dysfunction. A month ago, they shut down the government for no good reason. This month.....

Friend,

The senate continues to be the best example of Washington dysfunction.

A month ago, they shut down the government for no good reason. This month, they're going to move forward on immigration plans drawn up by Chuck Schumer, of all people!

It has to stop. The Democrats in the Senate need to go.

You’ve heard it from me before, Friend, but that’s why I’m running. To defeat Tammy Baldwin and turn Wisconsin red again.

To do that, I need your help.

With just 28 days to fundraise in February, we're going to have to step up our efforts. **I made a $15,000 goal to reach by midnight on February 28th.** [**Can you chip in?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJM6TvjZIqUrQFj9XQilpIJWCNhoAtC6FwZzcInAS0Ry_ruRHUvJaucn7ZV1ZgEcSvHOJ1UoZFIxcl38XFBt2Ys3z947r40WApnSWrUBOGEMvnYeCjSiwD6BVrwYOkagExcomM5MaL92fl2XYDtbwOUthyLHP22Iwq8G_CdOxUgvKN6YDoXzMm99Lpr9qN8QK-B6CrIe6O-BLPim9ES64KcNLYTmHLeKdng9De2xBEYq0zD15fDZ1gpEbnruD161sAIHi4ive-o1sw4kpwhjaBPXdC7vMmapb7LD-L4PvvvbIB3HPbKHc2H-40kn_JRUv5LZUera_F0NLd5sZCCTgjdo457FvIVvK72zSOPueI2Z6mpsZYE53doXuuIjAiAAfTuzKQY4iQEm5SU8Tfl5gsTcM%3D)

I want to have successful month to make it more clear than ever that the Wisconsin way is coming to Washington.

We've had enough of the inaction. Wisconsin deserves better than the failures of the status quo.

Let's meet our goals and help bring conservative change to Washington: ** [https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJM6TvjZIqUrQFj9XQilpIJWCNhoAtC6FwZzcInAS0Ry_ruRHUvJaucn7ZV1ZgEcSvHOJ1UoZFIxcl38XFBt2Ys3z947r40WApnSWrUBOGEMvnYeCjSiwD6BVrwYOkagExcomM5MaL92fl2XYDtbwOUthyLHP22Iwq8G_CdOxUgvKNt8cZgLksFwg2MS1m0dNHZVuoiRYTb-r2ecIw_bom_ePBQ_OyBBGD5m-pOf2R2waK2QZ16v_5faEB7nMCoKqnEhuMnWoy-TQdXzZx_-pRiNwLkPthuXI0Kg5bRToIyLbev_45wpQqyhlzqsJgOPrwEWosQSBCTN5UpHIjS3uWOvlCbtnGG-oPS-M8cqZn7j3SWXQ0YY2JT8Xci5kvfwi7Mogj281ccp6i2TnlLFrzDHA%3D)**

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=Aw9o_tfvPeBYuCy90Tbh2tdwIO3dV9_6C5mWwxiG9E_RDWLtB5iEYtNfoijDSDBVTLqhNHRv-WgYOXby5V0XEpJ1TXxXH1eFNfXuMQzOy6pAshp-4NuFTccjCEu-MbFSSBDv_BnoXTWLu6w35x9vrZSMD-DDJT_HAB8mwWs7jrNwJ6V-RaaBn9al2bc5W_6jB76JULsIxnpS89m_dv_Wy-wx_64tXGUhcoCgNGgnqEMDpOhxnRt8vmP8wgXmYMHo). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJM-maoK4QFdr4DZhFJZpBLOMavc2htXRt8FcE2mIx3IUT06GOhxIqw7LTbZ9g4N_8paufdp9B_3gGbiv1-tlOw94TzEImKDesV3nZsjrqRj57aPLxHhLSQ40gP40y83OPI1Xd-ufNzi21WGzC2od1x20WKSh-kJfCCpTURVNlDCwB1QBtAfiekY6MiSixy-2sru70BxRFtyYZjPDD64vvJ-bQkRNklfMSmfRXlF99JyGBjvtydVhZsnCBsCYvR8i7CuH7JntimnCcTlvrDRppKCmXRLDMSn0Z9WcZdEfd0bmi0_Is1k-mvPrC9aVBSyhcewb6Q7mr594NXgl1-Pv3SV-3DxuEe2vwFwa9XC0I54Ox) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJM-maoK4QFdr4DZhFJZpBLOMdzq8KIQtzgYvkzESb_u3yBvD9PDHjhcPEI_zDRrLq0MaB9n-Z32pv8J_X6V3awBqv9i9NrwLel194n9L3dj6XungglIOxYg9a9asKrCicKZRs9sYMFYkI_ctdEOWfdg8IyCnids102N2JEkk72eb8e7S9akQCgKLuhTMhffkm_h-gp7uhAQO8yoCyuqCHLH-FEmJv1lkmbthCluprvuCf0Q_IPSS8ZND1n4LMM-WaaSzjNXlIhBhtNPIXXZ5PFqJgGgz2vVdEuV0OYRsISJKkestDIcwOTBBTctDPVBxvRHsG3lLXe7g5xFnDDWWLsTas7vdoZNSKydskLzBbcoOE) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJM3fEMfsDoekKpRzo0Wmh-b31EQt3w8WlLk3Oq6sAQlCZTohRrHo8DeWxbD3_42yYZa1hVKVJrBfQj7TwzuV2QUmK3HBHMr445bMAyT_toE3p9A5v2A34ZoW5ubFbVxL5YZ0TD8BZg_44AbBOP-8PuieUMYivUiELwrc5R0JAzlxgoq52yGrh54UwgP5gG4k1xpBNyGiZWvCD7AC_SA_PDMS_Im1IZwHeBejbPsEh8_sHLJWXtmLeDe9HIUxnY_g2RQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJM9AO3YkwjcOiKNQ2hGZcjX21ZzjpfCLyLLVkHvqBJntAsOIolSoc4w5ALh8TMxShIILY4GjAHQNyh6DV14eDmJz715Xk4043YEClJaRo6PXDu9vej9SaYAhjf_DpYqVTz_2A3oVlKThwdIDtnAaruc4nZIPSgoeklKQYUfZh67Yitt0nb6xkd1eLy6R6RPfTGApYkqPa_4CrunuSMZq1K4lMfbws2jlHR5uk4qVnuFHHvkBKIbYPyRYZJcRuXyeauw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJMzC1b6d4i5esTKimQtH-GY34MZZftMqPhTEkllaBB-eCdsMIjZkhc8SbhSx7fByYxUfdI1xsCAr5HZ_uR_1wTZwPZS_qcCBOWJtX-mX-lb90PbR_9zadlrKJblDRPf3FylQNEhwEd3sxnMt9ymY-4qcuyOi7GFVLpShSWX_ffU_sMN4Dob2H1fi2H9dgDUCtzDna6mq1d9NYvuXUmB_BFqTQADP1bMTmVftbz7Mc2xjOtrA99Orl554QtwBJSqN33A%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=5dfqAzIcZcD5lipk93kJM-maoK4QFdr4DZhFJZpBLOO-DWBbu1M3tUgra-4Vhx35NC3rJRZu0rcsyy5fKoytYhnz6GhnXkEdfRTy3FFTPBFoL155YkCJtnGyVaaZaYp74AkaVsDbmZQus3NtST47a-g8fUXKQbwd2NhDkru2uRwoFUMjLLvBOOsJLzaJgBuAzechWNAUONQrKXraDzQNStWnq2SQTd9nLFfkc3iutBKog9TWB72nXx1ByLD6oH2w0gSM8zOiC_3TIXpw7lDiHaRrwhzFLZN7sMtHeN3xZjIg6crtq4eiLhe9JZc_Cda_XvXTf0-N4E-63wqMlbUF3Xg3LkF_S_O9zKccm4x91Mz0SCaZy1FKKCvqcFIDLePzUV7eOdsONpXDLDxHRHL3HQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=Aw9o_tfvPeBYuCy90Tbh2tdwIO3dV9_6C5mWwxiG9E_RDWLtB5iEYtNfoijDSDBVTLqhNHRv-WgYOXby5V0XEpJ1TXxXH1eFNfXuMQzOy6pAshp-4NuFTccjCEu-MbFSSBDv_BnoXTWLu6w35x9vrZSMD-DDJT_HAB8mwWs7jrNwJ6V-RaaBn9al2bc5W_6jB76JULsIxnpS89m_dv_Wy-wx_64tXGUhcoCgNGgnqEMDpOhxnRt8vmP8wgXmYMHo) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d252f276904d4d348d5f136653e368e3&_e=Aw9o_tfvPeBYuCy90Tbh2tdwIO3dV9_6C5mWwxiG9E_RDWLtB5iEYtNfoijDSDBVTLqhNHRv-WgYOXby5V0XEpJ1TXxXH1eFNfXuMQzOy6pAshp-4NuFTccjCEu-MbFSSBDv_BnoXTWLu6w35x9vrZSMD-DDJT_HAB8mwWs7jrNwJ6V-RaaBn9al2bc5W_6jB76JULsIxnpS89m_dv_Wy-wx_64tXGUhcoCgNGgnqEMDpOhxnRt8vmP8wgXmYMHo) to unsubscribe. clean_body: The senate continues to be the best example of Washington dysfunction. A month ago, they shut down the government for no good reason. This month..... Friend, The senate continues to be the best example of Washington dysfunction. A month ago, they shut down the government for no good reason. This month, they're going to move forward on immigration plans drawn up by Chuck Schumer, of all people! It has to stop. The Democrats in the Senate need to go. You’ve heard it from me before, Friend, but that’s why I’m running. To defeat Tammy Baldwin and turn Wisconsin red again. To do that, I need your help. With just 28 days to fundraise in February, we're going to have to step up our efforts. I made a $15,000 goal to reach by midnight on February 28th. I want to have successful month to make it more clear than ever that the Wisconsin way is coming to Washington. We've had enough of the inaction. Wisconsin deserves better than the failures of the status quo. Let's meet our goals and help bring conservative change to Washington: Thank you, Friend. Leah P.S. We have less than 72 hours before we have to close the books on February fundraising, and I don’t want to fail: Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Amanda Brown Lierman, Democrats.org
subject: My answer to this question:
body:
Here's the best way you can maximize your impact on this year's elections:
---
If you are wondering how you can maximize your impact this election year, I've got an answer for you: Become a monthly sustaining donor to the Democratic Party. That is hands down the best way to ensure Democrats have the resources to fight for the long haul and win big this year. What do you say, Derek?

**[Make a monthly sustaining $3 donation before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to help Democrats take on the GOP this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220bd/4067b0a/5696e2ba7/7e57646e/3399536884/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/organize-sustainer?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Make+a+monthly+sustaining++if+hpcraw+gt+&utm_campaign=em_20180227_abl_nd&source=em_20180227_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180227_abl_nd")**

We've flipped 37 state legislative districts so far this cycle, Derek -- and our momentum is even higher this year than it was last year. You've heard all about Doug Jones, but you may not have heard of Patty Schachtner. She won last month in Wisconsin's 10th state Senate district, which had been held by Republicans for _nearly two decades._

Democrats are also winning state House races in places like Georgia, Missouri, and Kentucky. Just last Tuesday, Kentuckians elected Rep. Linda Belcher in a district Trump won in a walk.

**Here's the bottom line, Derek: Democrats can win anywhere.** Our victories during these last few months have made that clear. It is just a matter of having the resources to continue mobilizing voters across the country.

**[Chip in $3 to become a monthly sustainer before tomorrow's deadline. Your support will help Democrats take back Congress and flip state legislatures in November.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220bd/4067b0a/5696e2ba7/7e57646f/3399536884/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/organize-sustainer?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in++if+hpcraw+gt+100+35+elseif+hpcr&utm_campaign=em_20180227_abl_nd&source=em_20180227_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180227_abl_nd")**

Thank you for being a part of this,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- With every door you knock, call you make, and dollar you donate, you help build our party into a winning organization. **[Now take the next step by making a monthly sustaining $3 contribution.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220bd/4067b0a/5696e2ba7/7e57646c/3399536884/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/organize-sustainer?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Now+take+the+next+step+by+making+a+month&utm_campaign=em_20180227_abl_nd&source=em_20180227_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180227_abl_nd")**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220bd/4067b0a/5696e2ba7/7e57646a/3399536884/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180227_abl_nd&source=em_20180227_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180227_abl_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220bd/4067b0a/5696e2ba7/7e57646b/3399536884/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180227_abl_nd&source=em_20180227_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180227_abl_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220bd/4067b0a/5696e2ba7/7e576468/3399536884/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180227_abl_nd&source=em_20180227_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180227_abl_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220bd/4067b0a/5696e2ba7/7e576469/3399536884/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180227_abl_nd&source=em_20180227_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180227_abl_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter,

All my career, I’ve stood
for the working families of the Southwest Side. Since I came to
Congress, we’ve seen a lot of change in the Third Congressional
District. Factories have closed or moved, and manufacturing jobs
have become harder to get. But our working families have
continued to fight on.

In Congress, I’ve been fighting too. I’m fighting for
American manufacturing, fair trade, and safe communities.

We’re only 21 days away from our primary election, so
tomorrow is our FINAL monthly deadline. We need your help to keep
fighting. Can you chip in now to show the depth of our grassroots
support?
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-feb-eom?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180227_1_1&amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

CONTRIBUTE
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-feb-eom?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180227_1_1&amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

I’m often able to really make a difference in Illinoisans’
lives. That’s why I’ve received endorsements from local elected
officials, the Illinois AFL-CIO, the Tribune, and the Sun-Times,
and it’s why I just received the American Trade Hero Award from
the Coalition for a Prosperous America.

People in our district know they can rely on me. They’ve seen
the bills I’ve authored become law, such as the American
Manufacturing Competitiveness Act that requires the United States
to develop a manufacturing strategy for the first time since
Alexander Hamilton.

I’ve brought real investments to the area, including getting
the law passed that created Chicago’s Digital Manufacturing
Design Institute.

I’m not a big fan of Washington, but I’ll tell you this: I
spend every day there fighting hard for the Southwest Side. Now
we’ve got a goal of bringing in $8,000 online before midnight
tomorrow. Can you chip in?
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-feb-eom?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180227_1_1&amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

I’m so thankful to have all of you stepping up.

Thanks,

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax
deductible.

-----------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs IL 60558 United States

name: NHGOP Press & Communications
subject: RELEASE: STEVE MARCHAND WANTS TO TAKE AWAY OUR GUNS
body:
**STEVE MARCHAND WANTS TO TAKE AWAY OUR GUNS**
**For Immediate Release:** February 27, 2018**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
CONCORD - NHGOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding Democrat Gubernatorial candidate Steve Marchand’s plan to take away Granite Stater’s Second Amendment rights:
“Steve Marchand’s gun confiscation plan is a ridiculous assault on the rights of law-abiding Granite Staters. Repealing Constitutional Carry and banning hunting rifles will not make the Granite State any safer - we are the safest state in the nation thanks to the pro-Second Amendment legislation and policies pursued by Governor Chris Sununu and New Hampshire Republican leadership.” ###
---
---

clean_body: STEVE MARCHAND WANTS TO TAKE AWAY OUR GUNS For Immediate Release: February 27, 2018Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310 CONCORD - NHGOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding Democrat Gubernatorial candidate Steve Marchand’s plan to take away Granite Stater’s Second Amendment rights: “Steve Marchand’s gun confiscation plan is a ridiculous assault on the rights of law-abiding Granite Staters. Repealing Constitutional Carry and banning hunting rifles will not make the Granite State any safer - we are the safest state in the nation thanks to the pro-Second Amendment legislation and policies pursued by Governor Chris Sununu and New Hampshire Republican leadership.” ### | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

help.

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: BIG NEWS: I'm running for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Congress
body:
| |
---
Dear Friend, I know many of you have been waiting for news about our campaign for Congress since Pennsylvania's maps were redrawn last week. After much careful consideration of the new districts, and taking into account the overwhelming support I've received, the funds I've raised, and many promising conversations... **I have decided to end my campaign for Congress, and I am immediately launching a new campaign for Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania.** Size and scope of the race aside, there's one major change I wanted to let you know about now! **The petition period to get on the ballot has already begun, and[we only have a week to collect 1,000 valid signatures](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/AXzJ8jze_-vvhHY8Hv6XP12T7OtkegVhaexkvJzsfNQ=) to secure our spot.** [I Want To Help!](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/AXzJ8jze_-vvhHY8Hv6XP12T7OtkegVhaexkvJzsfNQ=) The news made headlines on Philly.com yesterday, and I delivered the following statement to the press as we announced our campaign for Lieutenant Governor: _"**Harrisburg has been male-dominated for too long, and its culture won 't change without new voices,"** Ahmad said in a statement Monday. **" I will partner with Governor Wolf to help stamp out sexism and sexual harassment that holds us back."**_ [Again, we ](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/AXzJ8jze_-vvhHY8Hv6XP12T7OtkegVhaexkvJzsfNQ=)[need your help to gather signatures before March 6. Friend, can you join our team across the state?](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/AXzJ8jze_-vvhHY8Hv6XP12T7OtkegVhaexkvJzsfNQ=) Look out for more news about our run for Lieutenant Governor later this week! Thank you for your support, \-- Nina _**About Dr. Nina Ahmad:**_ Nina Ahmad is a first-generation American, scientist, and former President of the Philadelphia chapter of the National Organization for Women. She is running to bring integrity and accountability to the state house and to be an outspoken progressive voice in Pennsylvania politics.
[Learn more about Nina >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/dW8dl-jKAItZOVpqIhgBd5KS_4WVtsoVeLGbN-ih2CQ=) _**Stay in Touch:**_ [website](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/StM7lhdMrxmsvS4M3BF9QYlJGJYmUuPz2IWi4mD6NLA=) | [facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/WlKaQcItN1yoOUFyqVqxcqgrMm2YWrm4uBi6CSsSMQU=) | [twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/3o78Msx-NhLiZWK06ROPYEbxZ6IJPL9taFl3UU-31cE=)
---
Nina for Congress
PO Box 40681
Philadelphia PA 19107 United States | Paid for by Nina for Congress
---
If you received this message in error or wish to stop receiving email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/p4yl0jvNGIsbbSVpzyZdOfc5LUIVvWmxPlWNc_9Gr2c=/3Ba74pfe6zEkU53Ujrz_i29iulC_hl1A_S6H1bR63Aw=).

name: Joe
subject: I'll be blunt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
You may have seen the headlines about how I'm the top target of the Koch Brothers and their deep-pocketed special interests. |
---

| | Peter,

I'll be blunt. **[I'm asking you to pitch in $5 to my re-election campaign.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2340/7377f838/3055183f/51faca1a/168637133/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?refcode=20180227.1nd&amount=10")**

Now let me tell you why I'm asking. You may have seen the headlines about how the Koch brothers and their special interest allies are coming after me. They're all spending millions of dollars to replace me with a rubber stamp who will help them with their personal agenda.

They know that if I win re-election, I'll continue to put the needs of Hoosiers before the goals of special interests -- and they will do anything to stop that from happening.

Ok, so they're spending millions. Our side doesn't have their cash. **But what we do have is people like you. Tens of thousands of people who are ready to defend our values, our jobs, and our working families.**

I need you to step up now, Peter. Because the attacks have already begun, and the only way we can fight back is with grassroots power.

So I'm asking: **Will you pitch in whatever you can to show that you want a senator who will stand up to special interests and fight for the middle class?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

******[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2340/7377f838/3055183f/51faca16/168637133/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?express_lane=true&refcode=20180227.1nd&amount=100")******
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2340/7377f838/3055183f/51faca11/168637133/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?refcode=20180227.1nd")****
Our end of month deadline is tomorrow.

Thanks for your help,

Joe

* **Now we are facing our first fundraising deadline since this news broke, and we are coming up short. This is an urgent deadline that we cannot miss.**

If we do not secure victory in New Mexico, Democrats could fall short of taking back the Senate majority. That is why we cannot miss a single fundraising deadline between now and Election Day.

name: Florida Democrats
subject: Sign the letter: Ban assault weapons!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Team,

We're building a massive grassroots effort in Florida to ban assault weapons, and we need your help.

[**Read our letter to Rick Scott and Florida Republicans below, and add your name to our letter today!**](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/ban-assault-rifles-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Read+our+letter+to+Rick+Scott+and+Florid&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&source=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1") Dear Governor Rick Scott, Speaker Corcoran, and President Joe Negron:

In the wake of the Parkland mass shooting, millions of Floridians and Americans have come together with one simple message: **#NeverAgain.**

Over the past few weeks we have cried, we have marched, we have raised our voices, and we have fought to ensure that another mass shooting never again happens in our country.

**That 's why we were outraged and horrified when you -- Governor Scott, Speaker Corcoran, and Senate President Negron -- announced that your proposed "gun safety" legislation will NOT ban assault rifles.**
[Click here to sign the letter and act to end gun violence >>>](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/ban-assault-rifles-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+sign+the+letter+and+act+to&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&source=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1") Let's be clear: the 17 people murdered in Parkland and 49 people murdered in Pulse were killed by an assault rifle. **#NeverAgain means banning assault weapons.** Anything less will not protect our children.

Assault rifles are weapons of war that are designed to kill as many people as possible. They are not for hunting or self-protection. They are for killing and belong on the battlefield -- not in our schools, our churches, our nightclubs, or anywhere in our country.

**We urge you to listen to the students at Marjory Douglas Stoneman and the Floridians who stand with them.** We know that the gun lobby is prepared to spend millions to fight an assault weapons ban and that they have nearly unlimited resources to buy your votes.

But this is about more than just politics and campaign donations. It's about life and death -- and whether we as a society will finally ensure that our children are safe.

We urge you to listen to the students of Parkland -- and the millions of citizens who proudly stand with them. **For once, say no to the gun lobby and ban assault weapons now.**
[Sign the letter and demand an assault weapons ban >>>](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/ban-assault-rifles-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Sign+the+letter+and+demand+an+assault+we&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&source=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1") Sincerely,
Your Name Here

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bfba/1a5213b3/738956c9/718b149b/1847828593/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&source=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_EN_180DO_180227_1_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Team Gillum
subject: Fighting in February
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3186/9e00690/429258bd/2403a793/1575422950/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG&source=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG")
Hello,

As we approach one year on the campaign trail, Andrew had one of his busiest months yet.

He led thousands of students, activists and protesters in a march from Florida State University's campus to join thousands of people demanding common sense gun safety.

He stood up to Speaker Corcoran's racist, divisive television ad that demonized immigrants in a televised debate. Andrew believes that Corcoran's bill will try and turn neighbors against neighbors, teachers against students, and law enforcement against their communities. Andrew doesn't want any child to grow up in a Florida like that.

Andrew is fighting for the issues that matter most to us -- **[but our opponents want to silence Andrew's progressive message with their big money -- can we count on you to chip in before our critical deadline tomorrow to help fight back?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3186/9e00690/429258bd/2403a792/1575422950/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_content=2+-+but+our+opponents+want+to+silence+Andrew")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3186/9e00690/429258bd/2403a795/1575422950/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_content=3")

Listen, we've already seen the attacks picking up because of Andrew's courage and platform, and the attacks are going to keep coming.

**[So please, chip in before our critical end-of-month deadline tomorrow.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3186/9e00690/429258bd/2403a794/1575422950/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180227_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_content=4+-+So+please+chip+in+before+our+critical+en")**

Thank you,

Team Gillum

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Can I count on you in this fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The best way to stop Trump and the GOP's assaults on the middle class is to win back a Democratic Senate majority this November
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180227-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

Like a lot of families, I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class.

My dad sold fencing and carpeting, and ended up as a maintenance man. When I was 12, he had a heart attack and was out of work for a long time. We lost our station wagon, and we were in danger of losing our house until my mother got a minimum wage job answering the phones at Sears.

I know what's it like to be part of a family that has been turned upside down economically. And as I've watched Donald Trump and the Republican Party attack middle-class families, this fight is personal for me. This fight is about families like mine -- people who worked hard and played by the rules, and still find themselves struggling.

I'm a Democrat because I am in this fight on the side of working families -- and the best way to stop Trump and the GOP's assaults on the middle class is to win back a Democratic Senate majority this November. That's why I'm asking:

[**Will you pitch in $1 to the DSCC before the next fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight to give Democrats the resources to flip the Senate?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180227-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

We have 26 Senate seats to defend this year (including mine!), and I'll just be blunt: The Republicans aren't going to pull any punches when it comes to attacking Democrats who are facing re-election.

Right-wing super PACs are already coming after me and other Democratic Senate candidates. And the billionaire Koch brothers just pledged to spend an eye-popping _$400 million_ in the fight for control of Congress this November.

We can't let ourselves get pounded by nasty attack ads from shady right-wing super PACs. Senate Democrats are gearing up to fight back -- and we need your support.

**Can we count on you? Pitch in $1 before midnight tomorrow to help Democrats take on the GOP 's super PACs and win back the Senate majority:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/beat-the-super-pacs**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180227-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Elizabeth

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4c1/2b07114c/84ade8cc/731daf3e/192119552/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4c1/2b07114c/84ade8cc/731daf39/192119552/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4c1/2b07114c/84ade8cc/731daf38/192119552/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
