name: Harry Belafonte
subject: Movements don't die
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
When I was a child growing up in the 1930s, I lived in a very different America than the one we live in today.
I was fortunate enough to find success through music and film, but for many who looked like me, the story was not as promising. People of color were deemed less-than-human and were treated as second-class citizens. **The America I grew up in was a dream for a few, but a nightmare for many.**
But in working with my dear friend, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., we were able to fight back against the worst impulses of humanity. Through the Montgomery Bus Boycott, Freedom Rides, and the March on Washington, myself and other activists across the country united in a common belief that all are created equal.
And yet, now, in 2018, we are again bearing witness to the suspicion, the hatred, and the pervasive bigotry rooted in this new administration, that reminds me of what we survived.
**[That is why it is so important to stand with champions at the state level like Ben Jealous. Will you donate $3 to help power Ben's campaign today?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a739/7ab0e2c4/7f40c988/349a105b/2941406334/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02278A")**
We changed our country through some of the darkest struggles of our history. It was no small feat, and often it was ugly, but we did it--together. We ended Jim Crow. We fought for greater opportunity for all. We achieved equal rights for women and fought to let people of all genders, sexual orientations, and gender identities stand in the light.
I had the privilege of spending many days with Ben Jealous during the 2016 presidential campaign. I saw his passion, his conviction, and -- most of all -- his belief that, through hard work and tough conversations, we can find common ground and build a better world for all.
His Maryland roots and his devotion to progressive principles run deep, and he has a long family history of fighting for civil rights. His mother was one of the first students to integrate a high school in Baltimore, and his father took part in sit-ins in Baltimore to desegregate lunch counters.
**Ben 's grit and enthusiasm will make Maryland a shining example of how to defeat the evil that awaits us.**
Ben knows that to fight the evils of racism and hatred, we must offer a vision for a better future. He understands that all of us want the same things: equal opportunity and rights, good paying jobs, great teachers in every classroom, access to affordable healthcare, and the opportunity to grow their businesses and earn a decent wage. With his leadership, the Maryland dream is possible again.
**[There is still much to be done to advance our standards of humanity, hope, and decency. To do so, we must elect officials with the courage to face the enemies of our past so that mankind can turn its attention to the best in itself. That's why Maryland must elect Ben Jealous for governor -- donate to him today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a739/7ab0e2c4/7f40c988/349a105b/2941406334/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02278A")**
Let me be clear: our battle will not be easy, but it will be worth it. The heart has to find greater space for rebellion. So, bring it on.
Thank you,
Harry Belafonte
****[CHIP IN](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a739/7ab0e2c4/7f40c988/349a105b/2941406334/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02278A")****

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a739/7ab0e2c4/7f40c988/349a105a/2941406334/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a739/7ab0e2c4/7f40c988/349a1045/2941406334/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a739/7ab0e2c4/7f40c988/349a1044/2941406334/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a739/7ab0e2c4/7f40c988/349a1047/2941406334/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Please take a minute to read this, Derek
body:
None of this can -- or will -- happen without your support:
---
When Tom and I joined the DNC around this time last year, it was in rough shape, Derek. A big reason for that was due to fundraising.

One of our biggest priorities over the past year has been fixing that -- rebuilding trust with the grassroots and reforming the way this organization raises money. A year out, I'm proud to say that we've been more successful than I could have possibly imagined.

**Last year, two-thirds of the DNC's revenue came from grassroots donors giving contributions of less than $200. That is a big deal for our organization. It means the lines of accountability are running the right way -- to you, the people.**

If we keep it up this year, it will fundamentally change the direction of the Democratic Party, and we'll be so much better off as a result. But that will only happen if people like you step up to shape the future of our party.

**There's a fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, and I'm asking you to chip in $3 before then. When you donate, you'll be helping continue this party's transformation.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ca/4067b0a/5779a870e/7e5717d5/3676116338/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180227_ke_nd&source=em_20180227_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180227_ke_nd")

clean_body: None of this can -- or will -- happen without your support: When Tom and I joined the DNC around this time last year, it was in rough shape, Derek. A big reason for that was due to fundraising. One of our biggest priorities over the past year has been fixing that -- rebuilding trust with the grassroots and reforming the way this organization raises money. A year out, I'm proud to say that we've been more successful than I could have possibly imagined. Last year, two-thirds of the DNC's revenue came from grassroots donors giving contributions of less than $200. That is a big deal for our organization. It means the lines of accountability are running the right way -- to you, the people. If we keep it up this year, it will fundamentally change the direction of the Democratic Party, and we'll be so much better off as a result. But that will only happen if people like you step up to shape the future of our party. There's a fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, and I'm asking you to chip in $3 before then. When you donate, you'll be helping continue this party's transformation. "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: it's time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Last week Maryland students marched to the U.S. Capitol to demand Congress finally take action to address gun violence. They held signs that said things like "I'm here so my brother doesn't get shot" and "Protect our lives, not your guns."

It's been inspiring to see students organizing, mobilizing and passionately advocating for long-overdue commonsense gun safety laws to prevent yet another school shooting tragedy. But it's sickening that so many in Congress remain captive to the gun industry and are willing to block actions that will save lives.

[**Inaction from Republicans in Congress is complicity. We can 't settle for that. If you are as fired up as I am about this, please stand with me to make sure that Democrats take back Congress in November and stand up to the NRA.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91871/70cdc2ba/46f8c3cc/3903cf9/1215318126/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democraticmajority18?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Inaction+from+Republicans+in+Congress+is&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227")

Our youth are stepping up to call on all Americans to be part of this fight and for every elected official in this country to pick a side. Will they stand with NRA President Wayne LaPierre, who is calling for arming our teachers and accusing students of "exploiting the tragedy for political gain," OR will they take action to save the lives of innocent Americans?

Young people are leading this movement, and we must have their backs. After so many tragedies, we need to make sure this time is different.

[**Giving up is not an option. Together we must make sure that the fight to end this national disgrace is won. Donate now to help us take back Congress and win this critical battle and so many more.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91871/70cdc2ba/46f8c3cc/3903cf6/1215318126/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democraticmajority18?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Giving+up+is+not+an+option+Together+we+m&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227")

I promise to do everything in my power as your Senator to answer the call of our inspiring students and work to hold accountable those who stand with the NRA against what's right for America.

Sincerely,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

Thank you for standing with Chris!

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91871/70cdc2ba/46f8c3cc/3903cf7/1215318126/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list. To support Chris, send a check to the address above, or [**click here.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91871/70cdc2ba/46f8c3cc/3903cf4/1215318126/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-footer?amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180227")

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I would not ask if it was not important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Our political revolution was never about winning the White House alone.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
In just a moment, I am going to tell you about a very exciting trip I took last weekend campaigning for progressives and rallying against Trump's war on the middle class of this country.
But first, I want to tell you about one stop in particular, and that is my visit to Des Moines, Iowa, to campaign for Pete D'Alessandro. I also want to ask you to help him. Here's why this request matters so much.
Pete was the campaign coordinator for our Iowa Caucus effort. For almost a year, he lived and breathed for our political revolution and helped lead us to a virtual tie in the state -- a result that shocked the political establishment to its core.
Now he's running for Congress in Iowa, and I cannot imagine anyone who will fight harder for the working people of his district, and of this country, than Pete. He's with us on Medicare for All, a $15/hour living wage, free tuition at public colleges and universities and more. And he can win this race. But he can't do it alone. He needs us. And in this race, every donation will go a long way. I hope you'll help:
**[Can I count on you to split a $3 donation between Pete D'Alessandro's campaign for Congress and my work traveling the country rallying people to support progressive candidates? I would not ask if it wasn't so important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1")**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1")
Our political revolution was never about winning the White House alone. It was about building a movement of millions of Americans uniting to upend the status quo and transform our country.
It is about fighting and winning, not just in blue states and districts, but also in places Donald Trump won. Because the continued decline of the middle class, grotesque levels of income and wealth inequality, disastrous trade policies and an inadequate educational system affect them, too.
So I was happy to rally against Trump's war against the working class with more than 1,000 people in Green Bay, Wisconsin, a place Hillary Clinton lost by more than 10 percent of the vote.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1")
We went right into Paul Ryan's district and campaigned for Randy Bryce, the ironworker taking him on. More than 2,000 people attended and filled every inch of Memorial Hall in Racine, including the overflow section.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1")
We went to Michigan and had a wonderful event with thousands of people in Lansing. But before I left, I kept a campaign promise and returned to a church in Flint, Michigan, for an emotional visit. Even though the television news cameras are gone and the campaign is over, many of the problems in that city still persist and in some cases have gotten worse. They still need our help, and I am going to fight for them.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1")
We rallied for Chuy Garcia in Chicago, whom I am strongly supporting in his race for Congress. The turnout was great and the enthusiasm was sky-high. What's great about Chuy's campaign is that he's not just working hard to win an election, but also to build a grassroots movement supporting a slate of wonderful young candidates taking on the political establishment in that city.
And finally, we visited Cedar Rapids, Iowa, to rally against the Trump tax plan, and Des Moines to support my friend Pete.
Throughout our campaign, I told you that no one person could take on the political and financial elite of this country on their own. What this moment requires is people in the streets fighting for change, and a Congress that is willing to stand with them.
**Pete D'Alessandro will stand with us. He will fight, relentlessly, for the values we share. You can be proud to support his campaign. And if you do, I think he's going to win.**
**[Can I count on you to split a $3 donation between Pete D'Alessandro's campaign for Congress and my work traveling the country rallying people to support progressive candidates? I would not ask if it wasn't so important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1")**
Change never happens from the top down. It always occurs from the bottom on up. That's why your participation and support for candidates like Pete is so important. The political revolution is gaining momentum. Please support us.
Thank you,
Bernie Sanders
****[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pete?refcode=em180227-t1-e1")****
** **
** **
** **
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Sen. Kamala Harris (via DSCC)
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Eleven Democratic Senate women are facing re-election this year -- that's nearly HALF the women of the Senate.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180227-Harris-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

Eleven Democratic Senate women are facing re-election this year -- that's HALF the women in the Senate.

And here's the thing: there is virtually ZERO chance of taking back the Senate if any of our Democratic women lose.

Our Democratic Senate women are fearless fighters for working families and we need their voices to stop Trump's agenda and win back the Senate in 2018.

[**Pitch in $1 to the Women 's Senate Network before tomorrow's February deadline to give our Democratic women the resources they need to win re-election and flip the Senate.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180227-Harris-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

We know how close these races can be. Last cycle, Maggie Hassan won in New Hampshire by a little more than 1,000 votes. When Heidi Heitkamp won in North Dakota in 2012, it was by less than 3,000 votes.

And now, as Republican mega-donors like the Koch Brothers have pledged to spend roughly $400 million to attack my Senate colleagues, this year's margins could be even closer.

Women like Heidi Heitkamp, Tammy Baldwin and Claire McCaskill are already facing an onslaught of GOP super PAC spending -- and we cannot let that go unanswered.

**Your donation, of any amount, could make the difference in these tight races and ultimately help Democrats win back the Senate. Pitch in $1 before tomorrow 's deadline to elect Democratic women and flip the Senate majority:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/elect-women-to-win-the-senate**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180227-Harris-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4d4/2b07114c/8524d96a/731d91fd/3528956055/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4d4/2b07114c/8524d96a/731d91fc/3528956055/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d4d4/2b07114c/8524d96a/731d91ff/3528956055/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

Donald Trump and Republicans are launching attacks at us from every direction.

We need to spread our message and fight the smears on the airwaves, in the media, on the phone, and on doorsteps across the Commonwealth.

**But I've been running the numbers, and we're way behind on our goal.**

If we don't make up the shortfall while the opposition keeps pushing their attacks, we could lose.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We can't afford to lose Sherrod
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | When I was first thinking about running for the Senate, a woman in her mid-fifties came up to me at a meeting. It was so hot outside that your eyelashes would frizzle -- and she had walked two miles to get there. She walked because her car didn't run -- and her car didn't run because she didn't have money to repair it. She'd been out of work for a year and a half. What she told me still sticks with me to this day: "I'm here because I'm running out of hope ... I want you to fight for me. I don't care how hard it gets, I want to know that you are going to fight." During the 2016 election, I went to Ohio -- and I heard similar stories from people in Cincinnati, Columbus, and Cleveland who worked hard, played by the rules, and just kept getting slammed with one gut-punch after another after another. **The people of Ohio and all across the country need to know that they have another fighter in their corner, and his name is Sherrod Brown.** [_**But I 'm worried about Sherrod's 2018 re-election campaign, Peter. A new poll shows that Ohio is once again moving in Trump's direction. Sherrod's behind on this month's goal -- can you help him fight back by making a contribution?**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/200087a4/1419003430/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI3YSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180227a?refcode=sbe180227a_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/2000879b/1419003430/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI3YSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180227a?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180227a_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/2000879b/1419003430/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI3YSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180227a?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180227a_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/2000879b/1419003430/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI3YSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180227a?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180227a_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/200087a4/1419003430/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI3YSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180227a?refcode=sbe180227a_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** We can't afford to lose Sherrod in the Senate. He's more than just an ally and trusted colleague -- as the top Democrat on the Senate Banking Committee, _he is one of the strongest voices demanding accountability and transparency from Wall Street._ From Wells Fargo to Equifax, just know there is a reason Sherrod was called "Wall Street's Nightmare on Capitol Hill." **Losing Sherrod 's leadership in the Senate would be a loss for millions of hard-working Americans. And every minute he has to spend raising money to fight the right-wing attacks is less time he can spend fighting for students, seniors, women, and working people in Ohio and across the country.** [_**Please match Sherrod Brown 's average contribution of $26 so that Sherrod and I can continue our work to level the playing field for American families.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/200087a4/1419003430/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI3YSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180227a?refcode=sbe180227a_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | | | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/200087a4/1419003430/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMjI3YSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180227a?refcode=sbe180227a_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Thanks for being a part of this,
Senator Elizabeth Warren

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/2000879a/1419003430/VEsA/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/") [Poll Source](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4e5/4462dc26/4f875c23/20008799/1419003430/VEsB/ "http://www.mcclatchydc.com/news/politics-government/white-house/article199812624.html")
